name: checklistmaker
description: Offline checklist authoring and Copilot validation-package generator

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run verify:layout && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
scripts.verify:samples: npm run test:samples && npm run validate:samples && npm run samples:projects:check
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch" "tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --watch" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist/main/main.js dist/preload/preload.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.dist:portable: npm run verify && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable
